    Alibaba Cloud Model Studio:Model invocation pricing

    Document Center

    Alibaba Cloud Model Studio:Model invocation pricing

    Last Updated:Apr 01, 2026

    Text generation - Qwen

    Qwen-Max

    Method: You are charged for input tokens and output tokens.

    Factors that affect billing: If a model supports Batch Invocation, both its input tokens and output tokens are charged at 50% of the real-time inference price. If a model supports Context Caching, only input tokens are eligible for a discount. The two discounts cannot be applied at the same time.

    International

    In the International deployment mode, endpoint and data storage are located in the Singapore region, while model inference computing resources are dynamically scheduled globally (excluding Chinese Mainland).

    Model

    Mode

    Input tokens per request

    Input price (per 1M tokens)

    Output price (per 1M tokens)

    CoT + response

    Free quota (Note)

    qwen3-max

    Batch calling 50% off
    Context Cache discount

    Global

    In the Global deployment mode, endpoint and data storage are located in the US (Virginia) region or Germany (Frankfurt) region, and model inference computing resources are dynamically scheduled globally.

    Note

    The Global deployment mode has no free quota.

    Model

    Mode

    Input tokens per request

    Input price (per 1M tokens)

    Output price (per 1M tokens)

    Chinese Mainland

    In the Chinese Mainland deployment mode, endpoint and data storage are located in the Beijing region, and model inference computing resources are limited to Chinese Mainland.

    Note

    The Chinese Mainland deployment mode has no free quota.

    Qwen-Flash

    Method: You are charged for input tokens and output tokens.

    Factors that affect billing: If a model supports Batch Invocation, both its input tokens and output tokens are charged at 50% of the real-time inference price. If a model supports Context Caching, only input tokens are eligible for a discount. The two discounts cannot be applied at the same time.

    International

    In the International deployment mode, endpoint and data storage are located in the Singapore region, while model inference computing resources are dynamically scheduled globally (excluding Chinese Mainland).

    Model

    Input tokens per request

    Input price (per 1M tokens)

    Output price (per 1M tokens)

    Free quota (Note)

    Qwen-Turbo

    Note

    Qwen-Turbo will no longer be updated. We recommend Qwen-Flash instead.

    Method: You are charged for input tokens and output tokens.

    For models that support Batch Invocation, the unit prices for input and output tokens are billed at 50% of the real-time inference price.

    International

    In the International deployment mode, endpoint and data storage are located in the Singapore region, while model inference computing resources are dynamically scheduled globally (excluding Chinese Mainland).

    Model

    Input price (per 1M tokens)

    Output price (per 1M tokens)

    Free quota (Note)

    Non-thinking mode

    Thinking mode (CoT + response)

    QwQ

    Method: You are charged for input tokens and output tokens.

    International

    In the International deployment mode, endpoint and data storage are located in the Singapore region, while model inference computing resources are dynamically scheduled globally (excluding Chinese Mainland).

    Image generation

    Method: You are charged only for the number of images successfully generated.

    Formula: Cost = Price per image × Number of images generated.

    Details:

    • The cost is independent of the resolution or aspect ratio of the output images.

    • Failed requests do not incur charges or consume the free quota.

    Billing example: Partial image generation failure

    Assume the price per image is $0.10/image. If you request 4 images and only 3 are generated successfully, you are charged only for the 3 successful images.

    • Billed quantity: 3 images.

    • Cost calculation: 0.1 × 3 = $0.3.

    Video generation

    Method: You are charged only for the video duration (seconds) of successfully generated videos.

    Formula: Cost = Price per second × Video duration (seconds).

    Details:

    • Some models use resolution-based pricing, where the price varies by resolution (480p/720p/1080p).

    • Some models use mode-based pricing, where the price varies by video mode (Standard/Professional Edition).

    • Some models use aspect ratio-based pricing, where the price varies by aspect ratio (1:1/3:4).

    • Some models use uniform pricing, which is independent of resolution, mode, or aspect ratio.

    • Failed requests do not incur charges or consume the free quota.

    $0.100347/second

    Wan - reference-to-video

    Billing rule: Charges apply to both input and output videos by seconds of video duration. Failed generations are not billed and do not consume the free quota.

    • Formula: Billable duration = input video duration (up to 5 seconds) + output video duration.

      • The input video is billed for no more than 5 seconds. For specific rules, see Wan - reference-to-video.

      • The output video is billed based on seconds of successfully generated video.

    • Pricinf description: The unit price is decided by the resolution tier and the audio option, regardless of the input video's resultion or audio.

    Wan - digital human

    Note

    Only the Chinese Mainland deployment mode is supported. Endpoint and data storage are located in the Beijing region, and model inference computing resources are restricted to Chinese Mainland.

    • wan2.2-s2v-detect: Charges apply to input only. Billing based on the number of detected images. Each input image is charged once, regardless of detection success.

    • wan2.2-s2v: Charges apply to output only. Billing based on the duration of successfully generated video in seconds. For billing rules, see Video generation.

    AnimateAnyone

    Note

    Only the Chinese Mainland deployment mode is supported. Endpoint and data storage are located in the Beijing region, and model inference computing resources are restricted to Chinese Mainland.

    • animate-anyone-detect-gen2: Charges apply to input only. Billing based on the number of detected images. Each input image is charged once, regardless of detection success.

    • animate-anyone-template-gen2: Charges apply to output only. Billing based on the duration of successfully generated video in seconds. For billing rules, see Video generation.

    • animate-anyone-gen2: Charges apply to output only. Billing based on the duration of successfully generated video in seconds. For billing rules, see Video generation.
